rulings.Case Title: ACACIA BANK VS. DIAMOND BRIDGE PARTNERS,LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Osc Why The Dwelling Shall Not Be Sold;
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 21, 2017, line 1. Hearing On OSC Why The Dwelling Shall Not Be Sold: DENIED without prejudice. Any new application shall include evidence of capacity to enforce and evidence of compliance with (exemption from) renewal of judgment and enforcement procedures. The Court notes that Dave McGraw failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and failed to provide courtesy copies of any of his filings in violation of the Local Rules and Court's prior notification that such compliance is required. Any future failures to comply with the Local Rules will result in motions being taken off calendar/treated as unopposed. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: 1880 PINE LP VS. CYNTHIA DAVIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 21, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA DAVIS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED. Defendant to file answer by 4:00 p.m. on March 21, 2017. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: HPT GEARY PROPERTIES TRUST, A MARYLAND VS. CLIFT HOLDINGS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 21, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANTs CLIFT HOLDINGS, LLC, MORGANS HOTEL GROUP CO. LLC, and SBEEG HOLDINGS, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings DENIED. This unlawful detainer is based on violation of Section 13.1(a), a matter as to which arbitration is not expressly required under the Lease. See Section 18. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: HPT GEARY PROPERTIES TRUST, A MARYLAND VS. CLIFT HOLDINGS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 21, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANTs CLIFT HOLDINGS, LLC, MORGANS HOTEL GROUP CO. LLC, and SBEEG HOLDINGS, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on violation of Section 13.1 of the Lease. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LAN B. LEE VS. TYLER MCAFEE ET AL
